End Goal:
	1) It will be application where people can upskill without going through 100 of recommendation of resources.
		1) Website Interface
		2) Giving a set of Personality question
		3) Write a code on how to shuffle the questions and give it to the user
		4) display multiple options as analysis
	2) Application will help to keep a track of users goal so even if you go on a vacation or take some time off, once you are back it will help you revise the topics you left to.
	3) People can get good resources or at least the recommended one from this application
